calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Maria Del Pilar Arellano present in pro per. Patricia Lohidoy interprets English/Spanish and Spanish/English on behalf of the Appellant. Respondent, Joseph Spohn present on behalf of the City and County of San Francisco. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

JPT Elliott Myles reviews Notice of Appeal of which was filed late; determines that Appeal is invalid Appeal was filed 2 1/2 months late and is therefore untimely.

EXA1: Collision report, photos, insurance letter; collectively marked.

10:23am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Continued To Oct-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 414

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 414
